meaning: Special letters that begin this chapter (their full meaning is known only to Allah)
The All-Wise (describing القرءان, connected to وَٱلْقُرْءَانِ)
surely from/among (emphasizing that something definitely belongs to a group, connecting to الْمُرْسَلِينَ)
upon, on top of (pointing to صِرٰطٍ - path)
the sending down (possessed by العَزِيزِ الرَّحِيمِ - the Mighty, the Merciful)
so that you warn (قَوْمًا - a people)
a people (object of لِتُنذِرَ - for you to warn)
those who are unaware/ignoring (plural, in subject position)
upon/over (referring to أَكْثَرِهِمْ - most of them)
and so it [the chain] (connects to مُّقْمَحُونَ)
those who are forcibly made to lift their heads (referring to the disbelievers mentioned in أَعْنٰقِهِمْ)
a strong barrier (object of جَعَلْنَا - we made/placed)
behind them (after سَدًّا/barrier in this ayah)
they see (subject of لَا - 'they do not see')
and it is equal (subject of عَلَيْهِمْ)
The Most Merciful (being feared in خَشِىَ ٱلرَّحْمٰنَ)
in/with the unseen realm (object of خَشِىَ - fears)
then he gave him good news
with forgiveness (connected to فَبَشِّرْهُ - then give glad tidings)
indeed we (subject of نُحْىِ - we give life)
we (subject of نُحْىِ - we give life)
we give life (verb in نَحْنُ نُحْىِ ٱلْمَوْتَىٰ - we give life to the dead)
and we write/record (what they sent forth)
what (that which they have sent ahead)
and their traces/footprints (object of وَنَكْتُبُ - and We write)
we have enumerated it (refers to كُلَّ شَىْءٍ - everything)
a clear leader (in فِى a clear record)
and strike!/give! (an example) (connected to لَهُم - to them)
for them/to them (object of وَٱضْرِبْ - and strike)
a clear example (object of وَٱضْرِبْ - strike/coin)
when (introducing the story of أَصْحٰبَ ٱلْقَرْيَةِ)
came to her (referring to القرية/the town)
the messengers (who came to أَصْحٰبَ ٱلْقَرْيَةِ)
so they strongly denied/rejected both of them
so we strengthened (them) (connected to فَكَذَّبُوهُمَا - 'but they denied them')
with a third (object of عَزَّزْنَا/we strengthened)
he sent down (subject of أَنتُمْ تَكْذِبُونَ - you are lying)
you all (when speaking to a group)
except (connects وَمَا عَلَيْنَآ to ٱلْبَلٰغُ ٱلْمُبِينُ)
the clear message (referring to ٱلْبَلٰغُ in this ayah)
indeed we (subject of تَطَيَّرْنَا - we see an evil omen)
we saw bad omens (in relation to بِكُمْ - from you)
with/by you all (object of تَطَيَّرْنَا - we see an evil omen)
we will definitely stone you all (threat in response to تَطَيَّرْنَا)
and surely he will definitely touch you all
rather/but rather (contrasts with what was said before)
and he came (followed by مِنْ أَقْصَا ٱلْمَدِينَةِ - from the far end of the city)
he said (introducing what the running man يَسْعَىٰ said to his people)
O my people! (being called by the man)
the messengers (who were sent with divine messages)
no/not (emphasizing the negation of يَسْـَٔلُكُمْ/asks you)
he asks you all (subject asking the followers in this ayah)
a reward (object of يَسْـَٔلُكُمْ - asks you for)
those who are guided (subject of هُم)
for me (object of أَعْبُدُ - I worship)
the one who/which (describes the one who created me)
you (all) are being returned (to إِلَيْهِ - to Him)
with any harm (object of يُرِدْنِ - intends for me)
surely in (connects ضَلٰلٍ to the sentence)
in a state of being lost (after فِي)
by/in your master who cares for you (subject of ءَامَنتُ)
so listen to me! (to many people)
Enter! (command to one person) (connects to الْجَنَّةَ - Paradise)
with what/that which (referring to how غَفَرَ - He forgave)
he forgave (action in لِى رَبِّى - my Lord did to me)
my caring lord (the one who takes care of me)
and he made me (connected to مِنَ ٱلْمُكْرَمِينَ - among the honored ones)
the honored ones (referring to specific people mentioned in مِنَ)
and not (negates أَنزَلْنَا - we sent down)
after him (referring to قَوْمِهِۦ - his people)
those who send down (object of كُنَّا)
except/only (excluding صَيْحَةً 'a shout' from what came before)
and then suddenly (connects to هُمْ خٰمِدُونَ - they were extinguished)
ones who are still/silent (predicate of هُمْ)
Oh, what a deep regret! (exclamation before عَلَى ٱلْعِبَادِ)
the servants (who are being addressed in يٰحَسْرَةً عَلَى)
he comes/arrives to them (object of يَسْتَهْزِءُونَ)
any messenger (being referred to in مِن رَّسُولٍ - 'of any messenger')
except (what follows is excluded from كَانُوا۟ بِهِۦ يَسْتَهْزِءُونَ - they used to mock)
they see (in أَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ - 'Did they not see?')
how many (of the generations mentioned in أَهْلَكْنَا قَبْلَهُم مِّنَ ٱلْقُرُونِ)
we destroyed (object of يَرَوْا - they saw)
before them (referring to previous generations mentioned in مِّنَ ٱلْقُرُونِ)
from (connecting ٱلْقُرُونِ to what came before)
that they (referring to the previous generations mentioned in كَمْ أَهْلَكْنَا)
they return (subject of لَا in this ayah)
and if (connects this condition to previous statements)
surely with us (related to مُحْضَرُونَ - they are brought)
and a sign (subject of what follows)
the earth (subject of أَحْيَيْنٰهَا - we revived it)
we gave life to it (referring to الْأَرْضُ - the earth)
grain/seed (object of أَخْرَجْنَا - we brought forth)
and/so from it (referring to الْأَرْضُ - the earth)
they eat (from the grain mentioned in أَحْيَيْنٰهَا وَأَخْرَجْنَا مِنْهَا حَبًّا)
gardens (being described by مِّن نَّخِيلٍ وَأَعْنٰبٍ - of palms and grapes)
and we caused (something) to burst forth abundantly
in them/in it (referring to جَنَّاتٍ - gardens)
and what (that عَمِلَتْهُ their hands made)
she made/produced it (referring to what أَيْدِيهِمْ/their hands created)
so will they not? (expecting them to يَشْكُرُونَ - be grateful)
they show gratitude (referring to those who benefit from Allah's provisions mentioned in the previous ayah)
the one who, which, that (describes سُبْحٰنَ)
the pairs, the types (object of خَلَقَ - created)
and from/among (connects to تُنۢبِتُ - it grows/produces)
their selves (possessed by them in مِنْ أَنفُسِهِمْ - from their selves)
and from what (that تُنۢبِتُ ٱلْأَرْضُ grows)
we strip/peel off (the daylight from the night)
the daytime (object being stripped away in نَسْلَخُ مِنْهُ)
ones who are in deep darkness
and the moon (object of قَدَّرْنٰهُ/We determined)
we measured it precisely (referring to القمر/the moon)
like the date stalk (that appears in the sky)
of the old/ancient one (describing العرجون, the date stalk)
for her/it (referring to الشَّمْسُ - the sun)
that (connects to تُدْرِكَ - it catches up)
the moon (object of تُدْرِكَ - to reach/overtake)
one who races ahead (describing الليل/the night)
and all (as the subject of يَسْبَحُونَ)
in an orbit (referring to where celestial bodies move)
they glide (through space) (referring to celestial bodies in their orbits)
surely for them (connected to ذُرِّيَّتَهُمْ - their offspring)
and we created (connected to previous statement)
we drown them (referring to the disbelievers mentioned earlier)
any helper/rescuer (object of فَلَا - 'there is no')
for them (connected to صَرِيخَ - no helper)
a time, a period (object of إِلَىٰ)
it was said (to لَهُمُ - to them)
to them (masculine plural, connects to ٱتَّقُوا۟)
between (what is in front of أَيْدِيكُمْ)
and what (connects to previous warning to fear what is before them)
so that you all (might receive mercy)
and not/whatever (connects to previous ayah and negates تَأْتِيهِم)
she comes to them (آيَةٍ comes to them)
their master who cares for them (belonging to ءَايٰتِ)
away from it (referring to the signs/آيات)
those who turn away (subject of كَانُوا)
for them (being addressed in قِيلَ - it was said)
from what (referring to رَزَقَكُمُ - what He has provided you)
for those who (who are being addressed in كَفَرُوا)
should we feed? (questioning the disbelievers' statement in وَإِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمْ أَنفِقُوا)
you all (subject of the implied verb 'are')
except (connects to فِى ضَلٰلٍ مُّبِينٍ - in clear error)
in (location word related to ضَلٰلٍ - misguidance)
in complete error (describing the state of those who rejected in this ayah)
you all were (addressing multiple people in يَقُولُونَ)
except (limiting what they are waiting for in ما ينظرون)
they are able (referring to the disbelievers in the ayah)
and not (connects to يَسْتَطِيعُونَ - they are able)
and it was blown into (فِى ٱلصُّورِ)
and then suddenly (after وَنُفِخَ فِى ٱلصُّورِ)
they (referring to those rising from graves)
they are rushing out (from الْأَجْدَاثِ/their graves)
who (asking about who woke them up from their sleep)
he raised/resurrected us (from مَّرْقَدِنَا - our sleeping place)
this (pointing to what the disbelievers are saying about their resurrection)
and he spoke truth (about the resurrection)
she was (part of صَيْحَةً وٰحِدَةً - a single cry)
all together (describing the group in هُمْ/they)
you (all) are given what is due
that which (connects to تَعْمَلُونَ - you used to do)
you (all) were (referring to the actions in تَعْمَلُونَ)
you all do/work (referring to the actions of those being addressed)
of the Paradise (referring to the garden in Heaven)
on that day (when the people of Paradise will be in joy)
in occupations (referring to the people of Paradise being busy with enjoyable activities)
ones who are cheerful (in nominative case)
and their spouses (referring to the people mentioned before)
on/upon the raised couches (connected to عَلَى)
those who are reclining (referring to the people of Paradise)
in it (feminine) (refers to جَنَّات/gardens mentioned earlier)
and for them (connected to يَدَّعُونَ - they claim)
Did I not make a covenant (with إِلَيْكُمْ - to you)
to you all (connected to أَعْهَدْ - I took a covenant)
Adam (being addressed in يٰبَنِىٓ ءَادَمَ - O children of Adam)
Satan (as the object being warned against)
indeed he (is عَدُوٌّ مُّبِينٌ - a clear enemy)
from you all (who were misled by جِبِلًّا)
a very large group (being led astray in أَضَلَّ)
Then did not...? (connects to تَكُونُوا۟ تَعْقِلُونَ - you use reason)
hell (this is the one that was promised to you)
the one which/that (feminine, referring to جَهَنَّمُ)
you all were (being warned about in تُوعَدُونَ)
the day (object of ٱصْلَوْهَا - enter/burn in it)
you all were (addressing the disbelievers in تَكْفُرُونَ)
you all reject/deny (referring to the disbelievers being addressed)
we seal (referring to what Allah will do on that Day)
and she speaks to us (subject: their hands)
their hands (speaking about the disbelievers whose mouths are sealed)
and she witnesses/testifies (subject: أَرْجُلُهُم - their feet)
they earn/gain (referring to what they used to do)
and even if (connecting to previous statement)
we would have wiped out (connected to لَوْ نَشَآءُ - if we willed)
so how (could they see in يُبْصِرُونَ)
they see/perceive (referring to the disbelievers in this ayah)
upon/on (location relative to مَكَانَتِهِمْ - their positions)
and whoever (subject of نُّعَمِّرْهُ - We grant long life)
we turn him completely upside down (connected to نُّعَمِّرْهُ - we give him long life)
then will they not? (subject of يَعْقِلُونَ)
they use their minds (أَفَلَا - so do they not)
the poetry (object that was not taught)
not (in this ayah: 'this is nothing but...')
a reminder (connected to قُرْءَانٌ مُّبِينٌ - clear Quran)
and a clear recitation (referring to the Quran)
a very clear explanation (of the Quran)
so that he may warn (those who are alive)
he was/existed (describing who حَيًّا 'alive' refers to)
and it becomes true/proven (connected to لِّيُنذِرَ - to warn)
the disbelievers (object of يَحِقَّ ٱلْقَوْلُ عَلَى)
they see (أَنَّا خَلَقْنَا - that We created)
that we (subject of خَلَقْنَا - we created)
for them (referring to the أَنْعٰم - livestock)
for/to it/her (possessed by فَهُمْ مٰلِكُونَ - they are owners)
and we made it (the animals) easy to control
for/to them (referring to the animals mentioned in وَذَلَّلْنٰهَا)
so from them (referring to the animals mentioned in وَذَلَّلْنٰهَا)
and from them (referring to the animals they eat from)
so will they not? (asking about يَشْكُرُونَ - their gratitude)
and they took for themselves (takes آلِهَةً as object)
gods (as the object of وَٱتَّخَذُوا۟ - they took)
their help/victory (object of يَسْتَطِيعُونَ - they are able)
for/to them (referring to the idols who cannot help their worshippers)
those who are brought (plural passive participle)
he makes you sad (object of قَوْلُهُمْ - their saying)
that which (object of يُسِرُّونَ and يُعْلِنُونَ)
they make public (what they say, in contrast to يُسِرُّونَ - what they hide)
and has he not... ? (questioning the subject يَرَ)
he sees (questioning if ٱلْإِنسٰنُ has seen)
the human being (as the subject who did not see/reflect - referring to يَرَ)
from/of a single drop (of sperm/fluid) (after مِن)
and then suddenly (connects to هُوَ خَصِيمٌ مُّبِينٌ - he becomes a clear adversary)
and he set forth (subject of قَالَ)
for us (connected to ضَرَبَ - he set forth)
an example (object of ضَرَبَ - he set forth)
and he forgot (subject of قَالَ - he said)
who (asks about the person who will give life to the bones)
the bones (object of يُحْىِ - gives life to)
say! (command to يُحْيِيهَا - He gives life to it)
he gives life to it (referring to bones/earth)
he created it/her (referring to the first creation mentioned in the ayah)
the one who/which (connects to جَعَلَ - made)
he made (subject of the verb that connects to لَكُم - for you)
for you all (receivers of جَعَلَ - made)
from it (referring to الشَّجَرِ ٱلْأَخْضَرِ - the green tree)
And is it not? (connected to what follows about Allah's power to create)
he created (subject of بِقٰدِرٍ - being capable)
and the earth (as the object being discussed along with السَّمٰوٰتِ)
with ability (in أَوَلَيْسَ - is He not?)
yes indeed (contradicting the negative question أَوَلَيْسَ - is not?)
The Supreme Creator (subject of the sentence)
he wanted/willed (subject of يَقُولَ - he says)
a thing (object of أَرَادَ - he willed)
and so it becomes (in response to كُن)
so absolute glory/perfection (connected to previous statement)
